kept.text: @achillghost As far as I can tell the only way it "ruins" mythical creatures is that it calcifies the image people get in their heads when they read "fairie" or "elf" or "goblin." As long as you go into old literature understanding an "ogre" is just a vague monster type of thing it's nbd no?
